sections.paragraph:
- Original: χείρων

- Transliteration: Cheiron

- Phonetic: khi'-rone

- Definition:

1. worse

- Origin: irregular comparative of G2556

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Irregular compound of G2556; from an obsolete equivalent χέρης cherē s (of uncertain derivation); more evil or aggravated (physically mentally or morally): - sorer worse.
